commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Fix DB versioning breaking home page by caching rejected openDB promise (#342)

When openDB rejects (e.g., upgrade blocked by another tab, corrupt DB),
the rejected promise was cached in dbPromise permanently. All subsequent
DB calls (including listProjects on the home page) returned the same
rejection for the entire session.

- Reset dbPromise to null on rejection so the next call retries
- Add blocked callback to warn when upgrade is blocked by another tab

https://claude.ai/code/session_01PhB8mabBheqgsWLnQKj5Bc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Classify PortWithPackedDim → §23.2.2.3 [skip ci]

The test parses `module m(input logic [15:0] data); endmodule` — an ANSI-style port declaration where the port's data type includes a packed dimension `[15:0]`. §23.2.2.3 defines the formal grammar for `ansi_port_declaration`, including `net_port_type ::= [net_type] data_type_or_implicit`, which is exactly what `input logic [15:0]` resolves to. The packed dimension is carried inline within the `data_type` component of the port type, making §23.2.2.3 the governing subclause.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix vendor/price not auto-linking from CSV import

CSV with columns (sku, product_name, price, brand) was not linking
vendor prices because:
- 'brand' column was not used as vendor fallback when no 'vendor' column
- 'price' column mapped to unitPrice (sale price), not unitCost
- Vendor linking code required both rawVendor AND unitCost to be present

Now falls back: rawVendor → rawBrand, unitCost → unitPrice, so CSVs
with brand/price columns auto-create vendors and link prices correctly.

Fix silent sync failures causing cards to disappear

Sync errors were silently swallowed after retries, so cards created
during poor connectivity appeared saved but never reached the server.
Background refetches then overwrote local state, wiping unsynced cards.

- Skip background refetches while syncs are in-flight
- Warn before tab close if syncs are pending
- Add error type to toast system with red styling

Fix mobile map: offset below navbar and resize to visible strip on sheet open

- Map now starts at top: 60px on mobile, eliminating Leaflet event
  interference with the navbar
- expandMobileSheet() shrinks the map container to 200px and calls
  invalidateSize() after the transition, so Leaflet repositions dots
  within the visible strip
- collapseMobileSheet() restores the map to full height

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix race condition in useEquipment - wait for battalionId to be resolved

The useEquipment hook was checking battalionLoading but not checking if
battalionId is null. This caused a race condition where queries would fire
with battalionId=null, triggering the fallback query with '__NO_BATTALION__'
which fails security rules.

Now also check battalionId !== null to ensure we only start queries after
the battalionId is fully resolved from either custom claims or document lookup.

- Add build_export.py: timestamped export bundles (JSON + SQLite + GeoJSON)

Add non-flowing goo fluids, bucket placement and pickup

Register 15 fluid types (GooFluidTypes), source/flowing fluids (GooFluids),
and LiquidBlock per type (GooBlocks). GooFluid overrides tick() to prevent
spreading/decay. BucketOfGooItem gains use() for right-click placement
(up to 8 blobs per block) and pickup (drain goo block into bucket).
Slurry buckets cannot place. 1 microblob = 1 NeoForge mB (1:1).

commit.message:
fix: patch claude-max-proxy [object Object] bug + add patch script

Bug in claude-max-api-proxy: messagesToPrompt() assumed msg.content
is always a string. OpenClaw sends content as array of blocks
([{type:text, text:...}]) which serialized as '[object Object]',
so Claude received garbage input and responded with confusion.

Fix: added extractContent() helper that handles both string and
array content formats.

Added patch-claude-max-proxy.sh to:
- Re-apply the patch after any package update
- Runs automatically in deploy.sh on fresh VPS setup

commit.message:
Fix flaky tests that failed when a local .env file was present (#7)

Config class attributes are set once at import time, so monkeypatch.setenv
and importlib.reload (which re-runs load_dotenv) did not reliably isolate
tests from a local .env file. Replace all setenv/delenv+reload patterns with
monkeypatch.setattr directly on the Config class attributes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address security + simplicity review findings

Security (HIGH):
- Add URL scheme allowlists for $href navigation (web: http/https only,
  app: http/https/mailto/tel/sms only) — prevents file://, itms-services://
- Add timer safeguards: 0.1s min interval, 50 max timers, invalidateAllTimers()
- Revert toast/banner to no-op instead of wrong alert behavior

Simplicity:
- Replace AnyView in applyColors with direct @ViewBuilder branches
- Replace URL: @retroactive Identifiable with IdentifiableURL wrapper struct
- Fix Double binding truncation bug (Int(50.5) → 50 → Double(50))
- Remove redundant trim/lowercase in leaf color parsers (already done by dispatcher)
- Collapse identical Android parseHexColor branches
- Reject non-numeric rgba alpha values (was silently defaulting to 1.0)

98 tests pass (1 new for non-numeric alpha rejection).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address review feedback: simplify applyColors, use regex split

- iOS: reduce applyColors from 4 branches to 2 by leveraging
  foregroundColor(nil) as a no-op
- Android: use trim() + Regex("\s+") for multi-class split to handle
  leading/trailing/multiple whitespace correctly
- Fix markdown lint: add blank line below heading in plan doc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix Android build: use built-in theme instead of missing Material3 XML resource

Theme.Material3.DayNight requires the com.google.android.material:material
dependency, but only the Compose material3 artifact was present. Since this
is a pure Compose app, the XML theme just provides the activity window —
use the built-in Theme.Material.Light.NoActionBar instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address Copilot review: fix timers, toolbar, colors, seeding, locale

P1:
- Revert applyColors to 4-branch approach — foregroundColor(nil) can
  override inherited foreground color
- Only apply toolbarBackground when header background style exists,
  avoiding forced-clear toolbar

P2:
- Fix timer count race: remove old timer entry before checking limit
- Clean up one-shot timer entries from dict after firing
- Wire invalidateAllTimers() to onDisappear
- Seed TextFieldComponent initial value into StateManager on appear
- Android: use Locale.ROOT for lowercase() to avoid Turkish locale bug
- Android: add missing floatOrNull import in ComponentView
- Android: fix Theme.Material3.DayNight → built-in theme (no XML dep)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix Android StackOverflow: Any?.toDoubleOrNull() recursion

The extension function Any?.toDoubleOrNull() shadows Kotlin stdlib's
String.toDoubleOrNull(), causing infinite recursion on the String
branch. Use String.toDouble() with try/catch instead — different name
avoids the collision.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add test plan for components, navigation, and cross-platform parity

Covers ~65 new tests across iOS (45) and Android (20):
- ActionDispatcher tests (all action types + security boundaries)
- ComponentRegistry dispatch tests (type→component mapping)
- StateManager binding + cache isolation tests
- ViewModel lifecycle tests (load, render fallback, handleHref)
- Android color parsing, style modifier, state manager parity
- Cross-platform consistency via shared JSON fixtures
- Web deferred (legacy gulp 3.x not worth vitest infrastructure)

Deepened with 6 parallel research agents: security, performance,
simplicity, XCTest patterns, Kotlin patterns, institutional learnings.

master: fix cache directory rename corruption on WSL2.

commit.message:
Add provider routing metadata, caller region telemetry, and regional latency analytics

Gateway captures caller country from trusted ingress headers (Cloudflare,
Vercel, Fly) and persists it on execution receipts with composite indexes.
Provider onboarding surfaces first-class latency/routing/edge region fields
that merge into domainMetadata.nexusxRouting. Detection pipeline reads
x-nexusx-* vendor extensions from OpenAPI specs. Regional latency telemetry
aggregates per-region execution counts, success rates, and avg latency for
provider analytics. Schema migration adds caller_country and
caller_region_bucket columns to execution_receipts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: enable chatCompletions HTTP endpoint in global OpenClaw config

The /v1/chat/completions endpoint is disabled by default in OpenClaw
2026.3.7. The app was sending HTTP requests to a disabled endpoint,
causing 404 errors. Now the app and doctor CLI both check the global
~/.openclaw/openclaw.json and enable gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions
automatically if it's missing.

commit.message:
Fix agent edit form capabilities not loading

Server→client serialization was losing capabilities when passing Agent
objects (with Date fields and loosely-typed params) from server component
to client component. Added explicit SerializableAgent type with only
JSON-safe fields, plus a client-side API re-fetch as safety net.

commit.message:
Add English translation + TTS button to deaf speech demo

New /api/tts-english route: translates post-processed Marathi
output to English via Gemini 2.5 Flash, then speaks with Google
TTS (en-IN, female voice).

Demo tab now shows two buttons side by side:
  🔊 Speak in Marathi  — existing Marathi TTS (mr-IN)
  🌐 Speak in English  — new: translate then speak in English

The English translation is shown below the buttons in an amber
panel after playback. Both buttons disable each other while
one is active to prevent overlap.

Requires GEMINI_API_KEY (translation) + GOOGLE_TTS_API_KEY (TTS).

fix(tests): Fix flaky manage tests - use unique test dirs (#606)

manage.test.ts and manage.integration.test.ts both used the same
shared-state-manage directory, causing ENOENT errors and state
conflicts when run together in the full suite.

Fix: use distinct directories:
- manage.test.ts → shared-state-manage-unit
- manage.integration.test.ts → shared-state-manage-integration

Result: 7415 PASS, 0 failures (from 114 failures in #606)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
